MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2013 THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, WHICH IS UNOPPOSED, IS GRANTED. THE CONSERVATOR IS AWARDED $43,470 JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY AGAINST THE DEFENDANTS. IN LIGHT OF THE UNDISPUTED FACTS THAT EACH DEFENDANT WAS AWARE OF THE CONSERVATORSHIP AT THE TIME THEY PARITICIPATED IN SELLING THE PROPERTY AND KEEPING THE PROCEEDS FROM THE CONSERVATOR, IT IS ALSO UNDISPUTED THAT THEY ACTED IN BAD FAITH AND HAVE WRONGFULLY TAKEN, CONCEALED, AND DISPOSED OF CONSERVATORSHIP PROPERTY IN VIOLATION OF PROBATE CODE SECTION 859. THEREFORE, THE DAMAGES ARE DOUBLED TO THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $86,940. BECAUSE THE NOTICE OF MOTION WAS LIMITED TO THESE REMEDIES AND DID NOT REFER TO WELFARE AND INSTITUTIONS CODE SECTION 15610.30 REMEDIES, THE COURT WILL NOT AWARD ATTORNEYS FEES OR COSTS ON THIS MOTION.
